# Database Analysis Skill

## Purpose

Review SQL/schema/procedure questions with performance and safety focus.

## When To Use

- SQL query reviews
- schema impact analysis
- procedure tuning and risk checks

## Workflow

1. Identify joins, filters and cardinality risks.
2. Flag anti-patterns and indexing gaps.
3. Propose improved query/schema actions.
4. Provide validation plan and rollback note.

## Guardrails

- Prioritize correctness over micro-optimization.
- Explicitly call out assumptions and missing stats.
